kinds.description: Source/build ownership unit exposed as module metadata only when declared.
Declared module backed by a runtime service surface; not a general implementation root.
Declared module backed by a governed provider descriptor or backend selection surface.
User-facing Workbench presentation projection over commands, services, documents, artifacts, evidence, and views; not reusable behavior ownership.
Large Workbench composition made from modules, panels, views, commands, and evidence surfaces.
Module exposing or composing command-surface behavior.
Module centered on governed document/result schemas.
Module centered on view bindings and presentation projections.
Pack-provided module payload declared through pack/module manifests and delivered by content/packs.
Product composition declared as a module-like app assembly.
Module representing an external process or adapter boundary.
Fixture-only module used to prove validator behavior.
